title: Flower Totem
description: A Resourcepack that turns Totem Of Undying into various of flowers!
body:
A small and simple resource pack that replaces the Totem of Undying with a variety of flower designs—perfect for players who want a light, charming visual change without overhauling the game’s original style.

Make sure to use [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

Support [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)
